title: RFM
description: eBPF-based network flow analysis dashboard for RFM agents

panels.title: Flow Table Utilization
panels.description: Percentage of max_flows capacity in use (default max: 65536)

panels.title: Ingress / Egress Bandwidth
panels.description: Bidirectional bandwidth graph. Ingress shown above zero, egress below.

panels.title: Ingress / Egress Packet Rate
panels.description: Bidirectional packet rate. Ingress shown above zero, egress below.

panels.title: Bandwidth by IP Family
panels.description: Traffic split by IPv4 vs IPv6.

panels.title: ASN Pair Traffic
panels.description: Traffic between source and destination ASN pairs

panels.title: City-to-City Traffic
panels.description: Traffic between source and destination city pairs

panels.title: Ring Buffer Drop Rate
panels.description: Rate of flow events dropped by the BPF ring buffer. Non-zero indicates buffer saturation.

panels.title: Forced Eviction Rate
panels.description: Rate of flows forcibly evicted due to flow table overflow.

panels.title: Active Flows vs Capacity
panels.description: Active flow count with a threshold line at max_flows (65536 default).

panels.title: Sampling Efficiency
panels.description: Ratio of sampled bytes to estimated total bytes. Lower values indicate higher sample rates (fewer packets sampled).
